text: Theprincipalcontractor(alsoreferredtoasthe prime or general contractor ) is responsible for the full compliance of all employers (the contractor, subcontractors and any lower-tier subcontractors) with the labor standards provisions applicable to the project. Because of the contractual relationship between a prime contractor and his/her subcontractors, subcontractors generally should communicate with the contract administrator only through the prime contractor.  (See Contract Administrator, below.)
